message.content:
@startuml
title Class Diagram - SP02 CLASS DIAGRAM

skinparam packageStyle rectangle

package "controllers" {}

class Application <<C>>
class RelationService <<C>>
class AccountService <<C>>
class TransactionService <<C>>
interface Category <<I>>
class Family <<C>>
class FamilyMember <<C>>
class CategoryService <<C>>
class Relation <<C>>
class FamilyService <<C>>
class AccountData <<C>>
interface Account <<I>>
interface Transaction <<I>>
class MoneyValue <<C>>

package "category" {}
package "accounts" {}

controllers --> Application

Application --> AccountService : has
Application --> RelationService : has
Application --> Family : has
Application --> CategoryService : has list
Application --> Relation : has list
Application --> FamilyService : has

RelationService --> Category : has
RelationService --> FamilyMember : handles
RelationService --> Family : handles
RelationService ..> "category" : implements

AccountService --> TransactionService : has

TransactionService --> FamilyMember : handles

"accounts" --> AccountService : handles

FamilyMember --> Account : has list
FamilyMember --> AccountData : implements

Account --> Transaction : contains
Account <-- Transaction : contains
Transaction --> MoneyValue : contains
Transaction --> Account : has list

AccountData --* Account : implements

@enduml
